aquaculture_oxygen_triage.xlsx.notes: Workbook contains formulas, validation checks, sensitivity checks, and action package evaluation with pass/warn/needs_review labels.

farm_ops_memo.md.notes: Narrative triage report with row-level packet citations and decision rationale.

assumptions: No external data was used; all values from embedded packet only.
early_harvest is applied as removal of flagged tank from active constraint set; yield impact estimated as 18% of removed biomass.
transfer_800kg lacks explicit cost and operational constraints in packet; cost/status marked as NEEDS_REVIEW when used.

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
